title: UMI Service Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for system services (systemd, launchd, Windows Services).

ServiceName.description: Unique identifier for the service. For Windows, the short name (e.g., 'WinDefend'). For systemd, the unit name without '.service' (e.g., 'sshd'). For launchd, the label (e.g., 'com.apple.coreservices.uiagent').

Description.description: Detailed description of the service's purpose or vendor info.

Status.description: Current operational state. Degraded refers to a service that is active but in a failed or limited state (like systemd 'failed' or 'degraded').

StartType.description: Configuration for how the service starts. OnDemand refers to socket-activated or dependency-triggered services.

User.description: Account context the service runs as.

ProcessId.description: PID of the main process if currently active.

BinaryPath.description: Command line or path to the executable that launches the service.

UptimeSeconds.description: Seconds the service has been running since the last start.

ExitCode.description: Last exit code reported by the service when it stopped or failed.
